purpose: STL-native medium-cost OpenFOAM mesh candidate for optimizer raw-export candidates. This preset disables automatic feature-refinement boxes after mesh-only evidence showed better surface-fidelity p95 and lower cell count with corrected tip seed boxes only. It has passed potentialFoam and bounded 60-step no-slip kOmegaSST smoke on the three expanded real-export STLs, but remains rough-scoring development only because y-plus is below the configured wall-function target.

evaluation_tier.name: rough_scoring_cfd
evaluation_tier.intended_use: Score and rank plausible candidates by relative force-coefficient trends before expensive confirmation runs.
not_intended_for: training surrogate labels without later quality tags

surface_fidelity_policy.priority: preserve enough STL surface fidelity for relative ranking while keeping runtime low enough for optimizer loops

adaptive_promotion_policy.behavior: Default optimizer backend runs use the cheap first-pass stage. Use explicit adaptive or survivor-expanded mode only for baseline-building or promoted survivor confirmation.

early_pruning.policy_note: Generous pruning only after multiple alpha results. Never prune after 0 deg alone; skip remaining alphas only for solver failures, coefficient blowup, no meaningful lift, or very weak lift with very poor L/D.

first_pass.rejection_policy: Reject only clearly bad results; pitch-moment concerns are soft review until survivor-expanded sweep.

alpha_sweep_policy.purpose: Estimate rough CL/CD versus alpha, best usable L/D, and pitch-moment trend before finalist confirmation CFD.
alpha_sweep_policy.run_strategy: reuse the same mesh per candidate and run separate OpenFOAM solver cases with rotated freestream vectors
alpha_sweep_policy.activation_gate: use when the backend preserves per-alpha case folders and writes the configured alpha_sweep_summary_name

human_review_required: force coefficient outlier versus nearest neighbor candidates

known_limitations: Ranking coefficients are relative development evidence only.
Y-plus and wall treatment are not yet validated for trusted drag.
Short 60-step no-slip kOmegaSST force tails were stable on the three expanded real-export STLs, but this is not a mesh-converged or validated scoring campaign.
Current y-plus values are too low for the wall-function target: median y-plus is about 4.3-4.4 and p95 is about 8.9-10.2 on the three short kOmegaSST runs.
Surface fidelity can be weaker than final-scoring CFD requirements on large fresh STLs.
Rank correlation must be calibrated against high-fidelity reruns before optimizer trust is increased.
